mapper.select: SELECT c.CART_SN, c.USER_ID, c.PROD_DIV_CD, c.PROD_SN, c.PROD_NM, CASE c.PROD_DIV_CD WHEN 'TEXTBOOK' THEN t.SALE_PRC_AMT WHEN 'COURSE' THEN co.COURSE_PRICE ELSE c.PROD_PRICE END AS PROD_PRICE, c.ITEM_QTY, c.REG_DT FROM CART c LEFT JOIN TEXTBOOK t ON c.PROD_DIV_CD = 'TEXTBOOK' AND c.PROD_SN = t.TEXTBOOK_SN LEFT JOIN COURSE co ON c.PROD_DIV_CD = 'COURSE' AND c.PROD_SN = co.COURSE_SN WHERE c.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY c.REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO CART ( USER_ID, PROD_DIV_CD, PROD_SN, PROD_NM, PROD_PRICE, ITEM_QTY, REG_DT) VALUES (
#{userId}, #{prodDivCd}, #{prodSn}, #{prodNm}, #{prodPrice}, NVL(#{itemQty}, 1), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
